# NutriMind AI — Feature Inventory
<!-- Auto-generated by Phase 0 audit. Freeze date: 2026-07-08. Update this file on every architectural change. -->

## Status: FROZEN BASELINE
This document records every route, service, table, and API surface present in the production codebase at the start of the Global Enterprise Edition upgrade. All items are **protected features** per §1 of the master prompt. Any change that removes, renames, or degrades a feature listed here requires an ADR and backward-compatibility plan.

---

## 1. API Routes (Fastify v1)

| Method | Path | File | Purpose |
|--------|------|------|---------|
| GET | /health | routes/v1/health.ts | Ping / health check |
| POST | /api/v1/resolve/barcode | routes/v1/resolve.ts | Barcode → product resolution (waterfall) |
| POST | /api/v1/resolve/name | routes/v1/resolve.ts | Name → product resolution |
| POST | /api/v1/curation | routes/v1/curation.ts | Submit unknown barcode to curation queue |
| GET | /api/v1/products/barcode/:barcode | routes/v1/products.ts | Direct product lookup |
| POST | /api/v1/scans | routes/v1/scans.ts | Submit scan result |
| GET | /api/v1/gateway/complete | routes/v1/gateway.ts | AI gateway streaming |
| POST | /api/v1/voice/parse | routes/v1/voice.ts | Hinglish voice utterance → NLU result |
| POST | /api/v1/restaurant/menu/scan | routes/v1/restaurant.ts | Menu OCR → scored items |
| POST | /api/v1/restaurant/recipe/generate | routes/v1/restaurant.ts | AI recipe generation |
| POST | /api/v1/planner/generate | routes/v1/planner.ts | Generate AI meal plan |
| GET | /api/v1/planner/plans | routes/v1/planner.ts | List meal plans |

| PATCH | /api/v1/pantry/items/:itemId | routes/v1/pantry.ts | Update pantry item |

| GET | /api/v1/pantry/receipts | routes/v1/pantry.ts | Receipt list |

| POST | /api/v1/biomarker/lab-results/manual | routes/v1/biomarker.ts | Manual lab entry |

## 2. Core Engine Services

### 2.1 Health Score Engine (DETERMINISTIC — protected)
- **File:** `apps/api/src/engines/score/engine.ts`
- **Algorithm version:** `SCORE_ALGORITHM_VERSION` from `version.ts`
- **Inputs:** per-100g nutrition values (sodium, sugar, sat fat, trans fat, fibre, protein, nova group)
- **Weights (ICMR-NIN adapted):** sodium=0.20, sugar=0.20, satFat=0.15, transFat=0.10, fibre=0.15, protein=0.10, nova=0.10
- **Output:** 0–100 composite score + band (excellent/good/fair/poor/bad) + subscores
- **LLM prohibition:** Static CI check in `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (score engine audit step)
- **Golden test file:** `apps/api/src/engines/score/__tests__/engine.test.ts` (30 tests)

### 2.2 Allergen Detection Engine (DETERMINISTIC — protected)
- **Files:** `apps/api/src/engines/allergen/detector.ts`, `taxonomy.ts`, `fail-safe.ts`
- **Taxonomy:** 14 allergens per FSSAI + EU Reg 1169/2011 (gluten, peanut, tree_nuts, milk, egg, soy, fish, shellfish, sesame, mustard, celery, lupin, molluscs, sulphites)
- **Detection:** declared (ingredient list) + trace (label text) + possible (ambiguous facility phrases)
- **Fail-safe:** OCR confidence < 0.5 or parse quality low/unknown → blanket profile-allergen warning
- **LLM prohibition:** same static audit gate

### 2.3 NOVA Classification (DETERMINISTIC — protected)
- **File:** `apps/api/src/engines/score/nova.ts`
- **Heuristic:** ingredient keyword scan for E-numbers (200–299 range), 'artificial', UPF markers

### 2.4 Resolution Waterfall (Food Data)
- **File:** `apps/api/src/resolution/waterfall.ts`
- **Order:** local cache → Open Food Facts → IFCT 2017 → USDA FDC → curation queue
- **External APIs:** OFF (`world.openfoodfacts.org/api`), USDA FDC (`api.nal.usda.gov`)

### 2.5 Hinglish Voice NLU
- **File:** `apps/api/src/voice/nlu.ts`
- **Capabilities:** 25 Hindi/Hinglish quantity words, 15+ unit aliases, 5 meal-type patterns
- **Test file:** `apps/api/src/voice/__tests__/nlu.test.ts` (18 tests)

### 2.6 Energy Adjustment Engine
- **File:** `apps/api/src/health/energy-adjustment.ts`
- **Formula:** `min(floor(excess × 0.50), 500)` where threshold = 100 kcal
- **Citations:** Hall KD et al. 2011 Lancet; Pontzer H et al. 2016 Current Biology

### 2.7 Biomarker Flag Engine
- **File:** `apps/api/src/biomarker/flag-engine.ts`
- **Rules:** critical_high = value > normalMax × 2.0; critical_low = value < normalMin × 0.5
- **Panels:** diabetes, lipid, thyroid, kidney, CBC, vitamins, liver, inflammation (28 types)

### 2.8 Constraint Validator (Meal Planner)
- **File:** `apps/api/src/planner/meal-plan-generator.ts` → `validateDayPlan()`
- **Rules:** kcal ±20% of target; protein ≥ 80% of target

---

## 3. Database Schema (Supabase / PostgreSQL)

### Migrations (numbered, all with rollback scripts)
| Migration | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| 0001_extensions | pgvector, pg_trgm, uuid-ossp |
| 0002_identity | auth extensions, user_profiles |
| 0003_catalog | products, nutrition, ingredients, allergens |
| 0004_scanning | scan_events, scan_history |
| 0005_intelligence | scores, alternatives, recommendations |
| 0006_meals_carts_reports | food_logs, meal_logs, cart_items, reports |
| 0007_reco_copilot | copilot sessions, memory |
| 0008_knowledge_vectors | knowledge_chunks, embeddings |
| 0009_ops | jobs, audit |
| 0010_rls | Row Level Security policies |
| 0011_scan_history_embeddings | semantic search on scan history |
| 0012_health_data_platform | health_metrics, consents, oauth_tokens, sync_anchors |
| 0013_biomarker_platform | biomarker_types, lab_reports, lab_results, glucose_readings |
| 0014_meal_planner | meal_plans, meal_plan_items, grocery_lists, grocery_items |
| 0015_pantry | pantry_items, pantry_receipts |
| 0016_family | family_groups, family_members, family_shopping_lists/items |

### Key RLS invariant
Every table with user data enforces `auth.uid() = user_id`. Service-role bypasses are logged.

### 4.3 Offline Capability
- Drift SQLite: `local_scans`, `local_products`, `onboarding_flags`
- Offline scan queue → drains on reconnect
- Allergen gates work fully offline (deterministic, no network)
- Health score computed offline (no network)

### 4.4 Localization (Current State)
| Locale | File | Coverage |
|--------|------|----------|
| en | lib/l10n/app_en.arb | 100% (72 strings) |
| hi | lib/l10n/app_hi.arb | 100% (72 strings) |
| mr | lib/l10n/app_mr.arb | 100% (72 strings) |

## 5. Data Sources

| Source | Type | API/Access | Used For |
|--------|------|-----------|---------|
| IFCT 2017 (ICMR-NIN) | CSV (licensed) | Local file at data/ifct2017/ | Indian food composition authority |
| Open Food Facts | HTTP REST + bulk dump | world.openfoodfacts.org | Global barcodes, OFF barcode lookup |
| USDA FDC | HTTP REST | api.nal.usda.gov | US foods, branded foods |
| Fitbit Web API | OAuth2 PKCE | api.fitbit.com | Steps, activity, sleep, HR, weight |
| Garmin Health API | OAuth2 (partner, BLOCKER) | healthapi.garmin.com | Activity, sleep |
| Dexcom Web API v3 | OAuth2 (approval pending) | api.dexcom.com | CGM glucose readings |

---

## 6. AI Gateway

| Tier | Used For | Providers Configured |
|------|---------|---------------------|
| parse_assist | Label OCR cleanup, voice NLU, receipt parsing | Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini |
| vision_analysis | Meal photo portion estimation | Anthropic / Gemini |
| copilot_reasoning | Copilot chat, recipe generation | Anthropic / OpenAI |
| report_generation | Weekly nutrition reports | Anthropic / OpenAI |
| embeddings | Knowledge base, product semantic search | OpenAI / Anthropic |

**Critical invariants:**
- LLM output NEVER writes to score, band, or allergen-gate fields
- `scripts/audit-llm-writes.ts` enforces this at CI time
- `apps/api/src/policy/output-policy.ts` enforces at runtime

---

## 7. Background Workers (pg-boss)

| Job | Handler | Trigger |
|-----|---------|---------|
| fitbit-sync | jobs/handlers/fitbit-sync.ts | Scheduled |
| garmin-sync | jobs/handlers/garmin-sync.ts | Scheduled |
| weekly-report | jobs/handlers/weekly-report.ts | Scheduled (weekly) |
| report-renderer | jobs/handlers/report-renderer.ts | On-demand |

---

## 8. Observability

- OTEL: `apps/api/src/telemetry/otel.ts` + collector at `observability/collector/otel-collector.yml`
- Grafana dashboards: `observability/grafana/dashboards/`
- k6 load tests: `k6/scan-load.js`, `k6/copilot-load.js`
- PII redaction: `apps/api/src/telemetry/redaction.ts`

---

## 9. Security Controls

| Control | Implementation |
|---------|--------------|
| JWKS auth (Supabase) | plugins/auth.ts (jose) |
| RBAC | plugins/rbac.ts |
| Rate limiting | plugins/rate-limit.ts |
| RLS on all tables | migrations/0010_rls.sql |
| Prompt injection guard | security/prompt-injection.ts |
| PII redaction (telemetry) | telemetry/redaction.ts |
| Secret scanning | scripts/secret-scan.sh (CI) |
| LLM-write audit | scripts/audit-llm-writes.ts (CI) |
| No-mock audit | scripts/audit-no-mock.sh (CI) |
